hooks.command: cd /c/Projects/v0promptsgenie 2>/dev/null && [ "$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)" = "master" ] && ahead=$(git rev-list --count origin/master..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && [ "${ahead:-0}" -gt 0 ] && { git push origin master:master >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Auto-deploy: pushed $ahead commit(s) to Vercel\"}"; } || true
